content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Native Camp: Online English Teacher Anywhere in the World Beograd (Belgrade) All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0077/5564/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Japan <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://nativecamp.net/tutors/?cc=gb-wwr">https://nativecamp.net/tutors/?cc=gb-wwr</a> </p> <div><strong>About us:&nbsp;</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Native Camp is Japan’s No.1 Online English Service counting the highest number of both teachers and students who are learning the English language through our platform. Since 2017, we have started hiring teachers from all around the world, and we have created an environment that makes it easy for them to work and earn while having full flexibility.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>We are continuously expanding, introducing new features and teaching materials, and as a result of these efforts, more than 1.3 million members are using our service. Lessons are provided via a unique language platform developed by our company. We have simplified our application process and made it as quick as possible, so joining our team of teachers has never been easier. Join us today to experience the benefits that we provide.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>ONLINE ENGLISH TEACHER</strong></div> <div><em>(Home-Based job position)</em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>What we offer:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・Complete flexibility (24/7)</div> <div>・100% remote</div> <div>・Easy-to-follow teaching materials provided</div> <div>・No minimum hours per week required</div> <div>・Frequent incentives offered</div> <div>・No CV or experience required</div> <div>・Online support available</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>Requirements:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・English Proficiency</div> <div>・Laptop or PC with a webcam</div> <div>・Headset with a microphone</div> <div>・Stable Internet connection and speed</div> <div>・Quiet environment and plain background</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>Application Process:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・Apply through our website</div> <div>・Do the English Proficiency Test</div> <div>・Do the System Check and the Demo Lesson</div> <div>・Complete your profile</div> <div>・Start Teaching</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>The whole application process is done online, via desktop. Just follow step by step and the system will guide you through it.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>If you have any questions please contact us via our website (Contact Us page).</div> <div><br><br></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-33">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-33</a></p> Fri, 12 Jun 2026 06:51:23 +0000 Sun, 12 Jul 2026 06:51:23 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-33 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-33 Abstract: Full Stack Web Developer ⏤ Remote Contractor Anywhere in the World Analytics, Cross-Browser Development, Database, Decision Frameworks, Google Analytics, Computer Vision, DevOps, Hardware/Software Support, Cross-Selling, and Analytics Tools Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5534/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Stuttgart, DE <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://theabstract.co">http://theabstract.co</a> </p> <div class="description"><h2><strong>Who We Are</strong></h2> <p>Abstract is where excellence meshes with 3D technology and innovation. We engineer groundbreaking solutions that empower you to elevate your digital experiences to new heights without compromising the vision. From award-winning <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@InstaLOD">optimization technology</a>, scalable <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@InstaMAT_io">material creation and authoring tools</a>, to seamless scan processing and advanced rendering technologies — we’re at the forefront of reshaping how 3D content is imagined, created, and utilized through automation.</p> <p>But, none of this could be possible without an exceptional team, hungry to learn and determined to challenge the status quo. At Abstract, we foster a culture where every constructive input — from the smallest kernel to the grandest blueprint — is seen, thoroughly evaluated, and brought to life through our unwavering pursuit of excellence.</p> <h2><strong>The Opportunity</strong></h2> <p>As a Full Stack Web Developer, you’ll cover the full gamut: from designing and implementing scalable architectures to testing and optimizing for performance, security, and reliability. </p> <p>You understand the importance of crafting intuitive UI/UX touchpoints that delight. Maintaining our codebase, and adding new features and microservices, make you the forefront of our expansion efforts. With multiple projects in the pipeline, there are ample opportunities to expand our web presence and drive innovation across diverse initiatives.</p> <h3><strong>What You Can Bring</strong></h3> <ul><li>Deep understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles</li><li>Experience building highly scalable and secure web applications leveraging Node.js, React.js, and Typescript </li><li>Profiency with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB; TypeORM experience is a must</li><li>Solid knowledge of REST and GraphQL</li><li>Experience with cloud services like AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) and Docker-based workflows</li><li>Comfortable with CI/CD workflows, preferably via Bitbucket pipelines</li><li>Interest in working with cutting-edge frameworks such as Svelte or Tailwind CSS</li></ul> <h2><em></em><strong>About Us</strong></h2> <p>Abstract is a group of companies focused on developing bleeding-edge 3D technology:<br><br><a href="https://instalod.com/">InstaLOD</a> | <a href="https://instamaterial.com/">InstaMAT</a> | <a href="https://instareconstruct.com/">InstaREC</a> | <a href="https://rsxengine.com/">RSX Engine</a> | <a href="https://hello.polyverse.cloud/">Polyverse</a></p> <p>Our technology enables a diverse range of clients to complete projects on time, achieve significant cost savings, and enjoy the process. From leading AAA game developers like <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Q90L_3wzzQ">Sega</a>, Activision and <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ibi0GS_yJ4k&amp;t=47s">Phoenix Labs</a>, to the tech-powered creative giants at <a href="https:
